GRA Exceeded 2018 Domestic Tax Collection Target With Techno Brain Trips Solution
April 30, 2024

The Domestic Tax Revenue Division (DTRD) of the Ghana Revenue Authority (GRA) exceeded its 2018 target as it mobilised an amount of ¢24.4 billion.
